user.title: HA-LockBridge
user.description: Enter the host/port of your HA-LockBridge instance. Normally you don't need this — the bridge announces itself via Bonjour and Home Assistant should auto-discover it.

pair_confirm.title: Pair with HA-LockBridge
pair_confirm.description: Found a HA-LockBridge at {host}:{port}. Click Submit to start pairing. The bridge's Mac will pop up a window with **Approve** and **Deny** buttons — click Approve.

select_devices.title: Select locks to expose
select_devices.description: Found {thorbolt_count} ThorBolt X1 lock(s) and {other_count} other HomeKit lock(s). ThorBolts are checked by default — this integration is built for them. Other manufacturers are supported but typically have better-suited integrations available; check them only if you want to control them from here too.

progress.awaiting_approval: Waiting for you to approve the pairing on the bridge…

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge at the given host/port.
error.missing_uuid_txt: Bridge announcement is missing the UUID record — incompatible version.

abort.already_configured: This bridge is already configured. (Its host/port were updated if they changed.)
abort.missing_uuid_txt: Bridge announcement is missing the UUID record — incompatible version.
abort.pair_denied: You denied the pairing request on the bridge. To try again, remove this from the discovered list and re-add.
abort.pair_expired: The pairing request timed out without approval. Re-add to try again.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge to complete pairing.

init.title: Select locks to expose
init.description: Check the locks you want exposed as Home Assistant entities. Unchecking a lock will remove its entities on the next reload.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge to fetch the current accessory list.
